details:
CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender, and know the content is safe.Hi CR
 
Looks like when we are unwinding/assigning FRA trades, the delivery and maturity dates are being modified. Please see below example from this morning:
 

 
Initially we would have had this security booked with maturity date of 26th Nov 2025 and the delivery date as 26th Feb 2026, however it looks like the process of assigning has amended these dates to 5th Dec 2025 and 5th March 2026:
 

 
Please urgently investigate
 
Many thanks
 
Chris
*** Moore Europe Legal Disclaimer and Other Information*** Moore Europe comprises of Moore Europe Capital Management, LLP and MECM, Limited; these are investment management firms, who buy and sell equities and other financial instruments. Please do not provide us any inside information or material nonpublic information. We may buy or sell financial instruments based on the information you provide. We intend our securities and futures trading to remain unrestricted, and we do not agree to restrict our activities in any way. Please do not send us any information you are obliged to keep confidential, are not authorised to disclose to us, or are not authorised to have, whether any such restriction is imposed by law, agreement, government or company policy. This applies to information you obtain from any source. We are under no obligation to keep any information we receive from you confidential unless we sign a confidentiality agreement in advance. We ask that you provide to us only information that fully complies with these requirements and restrictions and that does not constitute inside information or material nonpublic information. . Moore Europe Capital Management, LLP - One Curzon Street, London, W1J 5HA, is registered as a limited liability partnership in England and Wales (No: OC322533) with its registered office at 27 Old Gloucester Street, London, United Kingdom, WC1N 3AX and is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. details_html:
CAUTION: This email originated from outside of the organization. Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender, and know the content is safe.


Hi CR

 

Looks like when we are unwinding/assigning FRA trades, the delivery and maturity dates are being modified. Please see below example from this morning:

 

 

Initially we would have had this security booked with maturity date of 26th Nov 2025 and the delivery date as 26th Feb 2026, however it looks like the process of assigning has amended these dates to 5th Dec 2025 and 5th March 2026:

 

 

Please urgently investigate

 

Many thanks

 

Chris



*** Moore Europe Legal Disclaimer and Other Information***

Moore Europe comprises of Moore Europe Capital Management, LLP and MECM, Limited; these are investment management firms, who buy and sell equities and other financial instruments. Please do not provide us any inside information or material nonpublic information. We may buy or sell financial instruments based on the information you provide. We intend our securities and futures trading to remain unrestricted, and we do not agree to restrict our activities in any way. Please do not send us any information you are obliged to keep confidential, are not authorised to disclose to us, or are not authorised to have, whether any such restriction is imposed by law, agreement, government or company policy. This applies to information you obtain from any source. We are under no obligation to keep any information we receive from you confidential unless we sign a confidentiality agreement in advance. We ask that you provide to us only information that fully complies with these requirements and restrictions and that does not constitute inside information or material nonpublic information. .

Moore Europe Capital Management, LLP - One Curzon Street, London, W1J 5HA, is registered as a limited liability partnership in England and Wales (No: OC322533) with its registered office at 27 Old Gloucester Street, London, United Kingdom, WC1N 3AX and is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority.

MECM, Limited - One Curzon Street, London, W1J 5HA, is registered as a private limited company in England and Wales (No: 03144922) with its registered office at 27 Old Gloucester Street, London, United Kingdom, WC1N 3AX.

Disclaimer Link: To see Legal Disclaimer and other important information, click the link below or copy and paste the link into your browser's address line.

https://d.moorecap.com/ukdisclaimer.html
closure_note: Closing this as Moore based on last communication took this internally with Guillaume to check and resolve.
